analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with existing CSS, HTML, and JS files. The event.json indicates the topic is black holes with a theme focused on animated objects, slides, and pages about black holes. The current files need completion of the black hole cosmic theme with animations, interactive elements, and mobile-friendly navigation.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, glowing elements, and Egyptian-themed color palette as requested.

Fix syntax errors in showSlide function, complete JavaScript content with proper event handlers for buttons, and implement mobile menu toggle functionality with smooth transitions.
Add mobile-friendly navigation menu with hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Fix SVG data URL in --black-hole-pattern-5 to include proper SVG content and ensure correct formatting.
Update CSS file with Egyptian-themed color palette and UI elements as described in the intent.
Add event listeners and functionality for new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
